    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    S

    Score - Class in game
    Manages and displays the player's score.
    Score(Properties, Font, Colour) - Constructor for class game.Score
    Constructs a score display using game properties file
    Screen - Interface in game.Screens
     
    screenHeight - Static variable in class game.ShadowAliens
     
    screenWidth - Static variable in class game.ShadowAliens
     
    setActualSpeed(double) - Method in class game.Screens.BattleScreen
     
    setTimeScale(int, double) - Method in class game.Screens.PauseScreen
    Updates the displayed timescale and speed, called by ShadowAliens whenever G or F is pressed while paused.
    setX(double) - Method in class game.GameEntity
     
    setY(double) - Method in class game.GameEntity
     
    ShadowAliens - Class in game
    Main entry point for Shadow Aliens.
    ShadowAliens(Properties) - Constructor for class game.ShadowAliens
    Constructs the game, initialises the window, loads properties,
    Shield - Class in game.PowerUps
    Power-up that grants temporary invincibility.
    Shield(Properties, double, int, int) - Constructor for class game.PowerUps.Shield
    Constructs a shield power-up.
    Ship - Class in game.Ships
    Abstract base class representing a ship entity Stores common position, speed, and initial state for all ships.
    Ship(Image, double, double, double) - Constructor for class game.Ships.Ship
    Constructs a ship with an image, position, and movement speed.
    shoot(double) - Method in class game.Ships.EnemyShip
    Tries to fire a projectile this frame.
    shoot(double) - Method in class game.Ships.ShootingEnemy
     
    ShootingEnemy - Class in game.Ships
     
    ShootingEnemy(Properties, int, int) - Constructor for class game.Ships.ShootingEnemy
     
    START - Enum constant in enum class game.GameState
     
    startInvincibility(int) - Method in class game.Ships.PlayerShip
    Starts invincibility period for the given duration.
    StartScreen - Class in game.Screens
    Displays start screen showing the player ship, game title, and instructions
    StartScreen(Properties, PlayerShip) - Constructor for class game.Screens.StartScreen
    Creates a new StartScreen, by loading text and layout properties
    stopInvincibility() - Method in class game.Ships.PlayerShip
    Immediately ends timed invincibility by zeroing the timer.
    StrafingEnemy - Class in game.Ships
     
    StrafingEnemy(Properties, int, int) - Constructor for class game.Ships.StrafingEnemy
